title: pergularia viridiflora
intro: Pergularia viridiflora, also known as the Indian periwinkle or Vinca rosea, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, and is also used to treat certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Pergularia viridiflora include extracts and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
